textByHashes.7e9041588f6e57c07956e60d947074430efba5c0: You did it! I wasn't sure I'd make it out of that one, but I'm glad you proved me wrong. Come, let's get out of here.
textByHashes.200f7339cd74b4b6bdac5d93a8bbcddbc2b7535f: Oh, you know, just getting over years of being controlled by a deranged family member. All part of the fun in a family like ours, I guess.
textByHashes.937e4c10ce45e2548ab6822c06eb9d87a78baf50: Well as I always say, 'the real winner is the one smiling.' What Amascut has done is horrific, but it's not too late to stop her. I won't let her get me down, not while there's still hope.
textByHashes.99afbfcb80fe6fa87cb3d496aa7ca5ab05881e8f: Anyway, I'm annoyingly a bit too weak to help you much down here. However, I reckon if you can free the others, we'll be able to open the way to the lower level for you.
textByHashes.8400a0248b55852ecda87ee38921a68e1b713e23: Anyway, we've been able to open the way for you! I wish we could help you down there, but we're still too weak. Don't worry though, I know you can do it!
textByHashes.b258b4315e5c60bf13b0698b93079423aa73373c: I'm annoyingly a bit too weak to help you much down here. However, I reckon if you can free the others, we'll be able to open the way to the lower level for you.
textByHashes.288a2e213813bef0b5d543cf6a76b0c5b844d1eb: We've been able to open the way for you! I wish we could help you down there, but we're still too weak. Don't worry though, I know you can do it!
textByHashes.a916f78774a1a67687777070cec5e94c9a7d1a5a: Don't worry, he'll be okay. He always is.
textByHashes.2d462e2e9ddbd26c88f4794b4f472f5640c1525c: I'm Tumeken's avatar of companionship! Tumeken himself was always considered a bit cold, which is a tad ironic when you think about it.
textByHashes.3a8a05b35e57f7ef7cc1281343970e2110f451aa: Exactly! Bit odd, right? Still, although he wasn't exactly known for his social side, he still understood the importance of such things. That's why he made me!
textByHashes.1de501876b9787dc6296bffb36c725a0a5e98553: My job is to make sure everyone remembers the importance of friendship. After all, we all need a friend or two, or ten, or maybe hundreds! Have as many as you want! I won't judge.
textByHashes.9957233d5f977edcf5332dc61da6ab23e407e052: Ah, you can thank Amascut for that. The desert used to be home to thousands of apes and monkeys, but she targeted them to try and get to me.
textByHashes.199f684617031ae36dd9443da9d9d417bad52f62: Don't be! Now that I'm back, I know we can turn things around!
textByHashes.b41745b31575cc94d0675f6b7dc9aeebed6bbb19: We'll be here when you're ready.
textByHashes.9930c8f3a662fcdaf529ec6e18e346b1d48aeeda: Especially when the baboon god is so fun to be around!
textByHashes.e8772eaa528595f761abb92303908828df94816e: But it's never too late for redemption. There might still be hope for her.
textByHashes.6a2aa9930a2642adead324f2a22885296d954f41: Icthlarin! If anyone can help Amascut find her way again, it's him!
textByHashes.86a582a7e68e8b6f1717649649870a80eefbc620: Oh yes, sorry. Maybe we should talk about something else.
textByHashes.e4056308bd3352f596384b5d7e1fe55c1dab80ac: Tumeken made us using his own divine essence! Each of us is a piece of him!
textByHashes.4ad35785c55ab8fc26e0b685af595432259ffeb5: Tumeken made them too. Difference is, they also have some of Elidinis' divine essence, making them a lot more powerful!
textByHashes.6833e656baced6028b4ed9cc16b6d358670c41d3: We're going to get started right away!
textByHashes.c65237a7de67263e2cdcbfaf76fae1a279263541: It was great to meet you. Thank you for helping us!
